name: dropdown-menu
title: BTDropdownMenu
description: Action menu that opens a floating panel of labelled items, group headers, separators, and optional keyboard shortcuts. Trigger via render prop; items via data array (BTDropdownMenuEntry[]).

files.content:
export { BTDropdownMenu } from './BTDropdownMenu';
export type { BTDropdownMenuEntry, BTDropdownMenuProps, BTDropdownMenuEntryType, BTDropdownMenuSide, BTDropdownMenuAlign } from './BTDropdownMenu.types';
